meta.title: The Air Force Releases Concepts Of The New NGAD Fighter
meta.description:
Last September, the U.S. Air Force shocked the aviation world when they announced that they not only had a design in mind for their Next Generation Air Dominance (NGAD) fighter, they’d already built a prototype and flown it. 

Recently, the U.S. Air Force released a report with some pictures of its NGAD 6th generation fighter program. Read the full article on Sandboxx News 👉 https://sbxx.us/3nrCAUK

Could the YF-23 have been better than the F-22?
Read More Here 👉 https://sbxx.us/3xuagFB
